findings.location: 作成する機能の説明 (source intro section)
findings.description: The source explicitly states that when no search conditions are specified, all project information is returned (「検索条件を指定しない場合は、全てのプロジェクト情報を返却する」). This default behavior is not mentioned in the knowledge file. An AI agent can infer it from the $if syntax in the SQL, but the explicit statement aids correctness.
findings.source_evidence: 検索条件を指定しない場合は、全てのプロジェクト情報を返却する。

findings.location: 作成する機能の説明 (source intro section)
findings.description: The source explicitly describes the matching type for each search condition: 顧客ID uses 完全一致 (exact match) and プロジェクト名 uses 部分一致 (partial match). The knowledge file omits these explicit descriptions; the matching behavior can only be inferred from the SQL.
findings.source_evidence: 検索条件として、 ``顧客ID(完全一致)``  、 ``プロジェクト名(部分一致)`` を指定できる。

findings.description: The hints array is missing the PascalCase class names `Project` and `ProjectAction`, both of which appear in the source code examples (e.g., `Project.class` in UniversalDao calls, `public class ProjectAction`).
